issue_title: In the constructor of UStbMinting contract, it does not set ustb
summary: The constructor of UStbMinting contract does not set ustb, it checks whether _assets[k] is address(ustb) from L187
root_cause: QA/low-risk implementation weakness described in the final C4 low/non-critical report.
why_not_medium_or_high: the issue appears in the final report low/non-critical or QA section and does not by itself prove a permissionless high-impact exploit
operational_risk: The constructor of UStbMinting contract does not set ustb, it checks whether _assets[k] is address(ustb) from L187
